roa.docketEntryComment: /MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT STIP/REV/X:THE DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED FROM HIS PREVIOUS COUNTYJAIL TIME,/CH1:SP2Y:M/CTSP:148/CCPV/CCC:1905055/DEFTSENT/VF5:200/PAR/CDC//TEXT/5A/5B/PRBSTAT/
CONTD SUPP RPT; DA MTR/DA-MTR/CONTD:IN DEPARTMENT 20, ON 02-22-2000/TBH:#1905055/SHER/NB/
IN THIS CASE BE CONFISCATED,COMPL DELANCEY STREET PROG,IF FAIL,NO CTSUP TO $40/M P/C,$150 PSR,$125 BKG FEE,DEF ACC'P & REC'D COPY OF PROB ORD
ISS,5Y APD,133DCJ/133DCTS,WS,SC,$200 RF,OOP RESTI,POSS NO WEPN & WEPN
ALLEGA STKN,PROP SENT SEE APD FORM,M10 AS X-SESS TO SUP CT
